# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment for our Node.js microservice. Focus on getting it deployed quickly - we'll optimize resource allocation later based on actual usage metrics. The service handles API requests and connects to a MongoDB database.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: nodejs-api-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: nodejs-api
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: nodejs-api
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: nodejs-api-container
        image: your-nodejs-image:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 3000
        env:
        - name: MONGODB_URI
          value: "mongodb://your-mongodb-host:27017/your-database"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "64Mi"
            cpu: "250m"
          limits:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
